name: vilnacrm-plugins
description: VilnaCRM Claude Code plugins: AI-driven engineering automation for VilnaCRM services

plugins.name: php-backend-sdlc
plugins.description: Full-SDLC automation for PHP backend engineering: GitHub issue creation, BMAD-method planning, bmalph/Ralph autonomous implementation with Claude CLI, multi-skill code review with BMAD FR/NFR gate, QA verification, CI auto-fix, and AI review comment resolution — looping until the PR is fully finished.
